problem id: ffa4e736
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01001110 -> 00011111
  01100001 -> 10111111
  00111100 -> 00011111
  10100011 -> 00101111
  11111110 -> 10111111
  00100100 -> 11011111
  10011011 -> 11100111
  10000011 -> 00100111
  00001010 -> 00101111
  10111110 -> 10101111

query: 10010101
predicted answer: 00110111
